title: Chess Club
description: Join the Stratford PAL Chess Club! We meet every other Friday. All skill levels welcome.

title: PAL Karate
description: Weekly karate classes open to all ages and skill levels.

title: Hockey Registration Opens
description: Registration opens for the summer Learn to Skate and Learn to Play Hockey programs at Shelton Sports Center.

title: Summer Camp Registration
description: Registration opens for July Summer Camps. Spots are limited — sign up early!

title: COPfit Registration Opens
description: Registration opens for the 4-week COPfit wellness and fitness program. Spots fill very quickly!

title: Roots & Recipes Registration
description: Registration opens for the farm-to-table gardening and cooking program for ages 6–18.
